name: Belity 1/4" AC R-12 to R-134a Retrofit Valve Quick Change Conversion Adapter High/Low Fitting A/C System Caps Kit
description: These Low/High side retrofits will convert your old 1/4" R12 charging port and allows you to connect the R134a hose. Package List: 1 * 7/16-20UNF (1/4") R12/R134a Low Side Retrof
